headlines.title: Seattle Weather: Mild Spring Conditions Continue
headlines.summary: April temperatures in Seattle are ranging from highs of 58-71°F with overnight lows between 46-52°F. The forecast shows typical spring variability with a mix of sun and clouds.

headlines.title: WSDOT Real-Time Traffic Data Available for Commuters
headlines.summary: Washington State Department of Transportation continues providing real-time travel data through interactive maps and route-based alerts for drivers across the state.

headlines.title: Seattle Times Traffic Section Updates
headlines.summary: Local traffic coverage includes bicycle routes, mountain pass conditions, border crossings, and highway camera feeds for comprehensive travel planning.

weather.forecast: Partly cloudy with mild spring temperatures. Highs in the mid-60s, lows in the upper 40s. Typical April variability with occasional showers possible.
